'''Ladro''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] that supported the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Planet-stub}}
